hook.text: Clear water can be deadly. Invisible pathogens cause more illness than dirty-looking water.

buildup.text: Contaminated water carries bacteria, viruses, and parasites that cause severe illness.

discovery.text: Boiling water for one minute kills virtually all pathogens—the oldest purification method.

twist.text: Chemical tablets, UV pens, and portable filters each have strengths for different situations.

climax.text: 8 drops of household bleach per gallon can purify water when nothing else is available.

punchline.text: Can't be sure it's safe? Boil it. That rule is 10,000 years old.

quiz.question: How long should water be boiled to kill most pathogens?
